overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character exploring a vibrant outdoor market built around a derelict aircraft structure. The character walks through the bustling zone, stops to smoke a cigarette near a bench while observing the surroundings, then continues walking through the market stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor market bazaar with temporary stalls and seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the market area past green vending machines and various NPCs sitting on benches

entered.detail: tall green vending kiosk with illuminated display panels
long bench with red cushioning where NPCs are seated
temporary vendor stall with canopy and goods on display
metal scaffolding with green corrugated metal panels
large crashed futuristic aircraft fuselage serving as market backdrop

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit outdoor market built around a massive derelict aircraft structure. Green vending machines and corrugated metal stalls line the concrete walkway while NPCs lounge on red-cushioned benches. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character navigates through the scattered crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: market seating area near derelict aircraft wreckage

events.description: character stops walking and turns to face the surrounding market area
character takes out a cigarette and begins smoking while standing near a bench

agents.ego_description: standing idle near a bench smoking a cigarette and looking around the market

notable_agents.action: sitting on the bench smoking a cigarette
walking past the character wearing a pink vest

segments.scene_description: The character stops walking and stands near a bench to smoke a cigarette. The camera orbits around the stationary character, revealing the massive derelict aircraft structure dominating the background. An NPC sits on the nearby bench smoking, while another pedestrian walks past in a pink vest.

events.description: character finishes smoking and begins walking away from the bench area

agents.ego_description: walking away from the seating area toward the market stalls in the distance

entered.detail: rusted corrugated metal sheets forming a ramp or walkway
vendor stall with colorful umbrella canopy

segments.scene_description: The character extinguishes the cigarette and resumes walking through the market, passing over corrugated metal sheets and approaching vendor stalls with colorful umbrellas. The camera follows from behind as the character moves deeper into the bustling market area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit outdoor market that transitions from a wide walk to an intimate character study before pushing deeper into the commercial hub. It begins by following the character from behind as they navigate a concrete walkway lined with green vending machines and corrugated metal stalls beneath a massive derelict aircraft. As the character stops to smoke near a red-cushioned bench, the camera orbits around them to reveal the scale of the aircraft structure and the surrounding pedestrians, including a person in a pink vest. The scene then shifts back into motion as the character extinguishes the cigarette and resumes their path, moving over metal sheets toward vendor stalls with colorful umbrellas. The camera finally follows the character from behind once more, gliding deeper into the bustling heart of the market.
